message:
test(config): reject daemonize runtime mutation

frankenredis-bnog

 {"id":"frankenredis-bleh","title":"Add metamorphic property tests for core Redis command semantics","notes":"fr-store/tests/metamorphic.rs has comprehensive property tests for Redis command semantics","status":"completed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T01:20:03.538156228Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T08:50:39.896742259Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-bn4g","title":"Fix lua_eval test module delimiter break blocking workspace builds","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-01T03:03:24.064213252Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T03:08:35.064243943Z","closed_at":"2026-04-01T03:08:35.063900985Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenredis-bnog","title":"Reject CONFIG SET daemonize as immutable","description":"Redis marks daemonize as IMMUTABLE_CONFIG in legacy_redis_code/redis/src/config.c. FrankenRedis exposes daemonize as a static CONFIG parameter and currently accepts CONFIG SET through the static fallback. Add runtime and fixture coverage that rejects mutation while preserving CONFIG GET visibility.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T11:06:40.854920583Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T11:14:43.593463693Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T11:14:43.591584998Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","conformance","upstream-parity"]}
 {"id":"frankenredis-bnp","title":"Implement keyspace notifications (notify-keyspace-events)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-22T17:41:10.597310762Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-22T17:58:07.849027104Z","closed_at":"2026-03-22T17:58:07.848547585Z","close_reason":"Implemented keyspace notifications: CONFIG SET notify-keyspace-events parsing, notification event generation for all write commands (strings, lists, sets, hashes, sorted sets, streams), delivery via pub/sub to __keyspace@<db>__:<key> and __keyevent@<db>__:<event> channels","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-bota","title":"Align blocking timeout conversion with Redis ceil semantics","description":"Redis rounds blocking command timeouts up to the next millisecond via ceill(seconds * 1000) and errors on out-of-range values. FrankenRedis currently truncates in fr-server parse_blocking_deadline and only validates finite/nonnegative syntax in fr-command, which can shorten positive fractional waits and accept oversized finite inputs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-06T21:54:33.162161505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-06T22:01:19.140656623Z","closed_at":"2026-04-06T22:01:19.140463017Z","close_reason":"Implemented Redis-ceil blocking timeout conversion alignment","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-bqot","title":"Track real total_reads_processed and total_writes_processed in INFO stats","description":"# Track real total_reads_processed and total_writes_processed in INFO stats

## Why
`INFO stats` still hardcodes `total_reads_processed:0` and `total_writes_processed:0` even though command metadata already distinguishes read and write surfaces.

## Scope
- Add store-owned counters for client-visible read and write commands.
- Use command flags from `fr_command::get_command_flags` to classify completed commands in runtime.
- Wire `INFO stats` to emit the real counters.
- Reset them in `CONFIG RESETSTAT`.
- Add focused tests for one readonly command and one write command, plus INFO visibility.

## Files
- `crates/fr-store/src/lib.rs`
- `crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs`
- `crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs`

## Validation
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-command info_stats_reports_expire_and_evict_counters -- --exact --nocapture`
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-runtime --lib total_reads_and_writes_processed_counts_classified_commands -- --exact --nocapture`
- `rch exec -- cargo check -p fr-runtime --lib`","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-06T00:00:19.374029335Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-06T00:02:25.729165806Z","closed_at":"2026-04-06T00:02:25.728889032Z","close_reason":"Implemented store-backed read/write counters, INFO stats wiring, resetstat coverage, and focused tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

@@ -758,6 +758,20 @@
         "value": "ERR CONFIG SET failed (possibly related to argument 'rdbchecksum') - can't set immutable config"
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "config_set_daemonize_immutable",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "CONFIG",
+        "SET",
+        "daemonize",
+        "yes"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR CONFIG SET failed (possibly related to argument 'daemonize') - can't set immutable config"
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "config_set_known_static_noop",
       "now_ms": 0,

@@ -6396,6 +6396,7 @@ impl Runtime {
                 || parameter.eq_ignore_ascii_case("bind")
                 || parameter.eq_ignore_ascii_case("cluster-enabled")
                 || parameter.eq_ignore_ascii_case("databases")
+                || parameter.eq_ignore_ascii_case("daemonize")
                 || parameter.eq_ignore_ascii_case("port")
                 || parameter.eq_ignore_ascii_case("rdbchecksum")
                 || parameter.eq_ignore_ascii_case("tcp-backlog")
@@ -14637,6 +14638,20 @@ mod tests {
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"yes".to_vec())),
             ]))
         );
+        assert_eq!(
+            rt.execute_frame(command(&[b"CONFIG", b"SET", b"daemonize", b"yes"]), 0),
+            RespFrame::Error(
+                "ERR CONFIG SET failed (possibly related to argument 'daemonize') - can't set immutable config"
+                    .to_string()
+            )
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            rt.execute_frame(command(&[b"CONFIG", b"GET", b"daemonize"]), 0),
+            RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
+                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"daemonize".to_vec())),
+                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"no".to_vec())),
+            ]))
+        );
     }
 
     #[test]
